name: MarketingPro
tagline: Marketing SaaS — AI content generator (Gemini), Stripe billing, visual content calendar, analytics dashboard with recharts
description: Full-stack SaaS for marketing teams. AI content generator using Gemini API with multi-platform output (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok). Visual monthly content calendar with scheduling. Analytics dashboard with recharts: impressions, engagement, posts per week, platform distribution, best posting times. Stripe billing: Free (5 posts/mo), Pro $19/mo (100 posts), Business $49/mo (unlimited). Clean landing page with pricing table.
content_angles: Full-stack SaaS: auth, Stripe billing, dashboards, analytics
Modern stack: React + Express + PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
Stripe subscription management with webhook handling
